title: Integration test programs
description:
Create .ryx integration test programs and their expected output files in tests/testdata/programs/.

Create these 4 programs with exact content from goal spec section 9.7:

1. map_operations.ryx + map_operations.expected:
   Tests map_new, map_set, map_get, map_len, map_contains, map_delete, overwrite.
   Expected: 3, 42, 17, true, false, 2, false, 100

2. word_counter.ryx + word_counter.expected:
   Uses string_split + map operations to count word frequencies.
   Expected: 5, 3, 2, 1, 1, 1

3. phone_book.ryx + phone_book.expected:
   Map as phone directory with lookup, update, delete.
   Expected: 555-0200, 555-9999, 3, false, 2

4. group_by.ryx + group_by.expected:
   Groups numbers into even/odd using maps + arrays + array_sum.
   Expected: 5, 5, 30, 25

Also verify these run correctly with: go run ./cmd/ryx run <program.ryx>

Ensure integration test runner picks up new .ryx files (check how existing integration tests work in tests/integration/).
